description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release with concurrency set to build. Trigger on push to any tag. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build, test-containers, test-mongo, test-sql, and publish. The build job builds a Docker image. The test jobs run various tests, including TestContainers, Mongo, and SQL tests. The publish job builds and pushes a multi-platform Docker image, creates a release with binaries and changelog, and cleans up.
